title: Medical Laboratory Techniques Mission and Vision
content:
Medical Laboratory Techniques Mission and Vision

Mission:

Medical Laboratory Techniques program within Üsküdar University Health Services Vocational School, students who can use technological devices, tools and equipment in laboratories, follow current techniques, apply their skills to solve the problem of human health and ethics, and have the ability to meet the needs of qualified intermediate staff in our country. has been tasked to train.

Vision:

Medical Laboratory Techniques program within Üsküdar University Health Services Vocational School is to ensure that prestigious and qualified individuals who have gained international knowledge in the field of Medical Laboratory are preferred for employment in the public and private sectors.
